simple_types.name: ggml_glu_op

type ggml_glu_op is 
  (GGML_GLU_OP_REGLU,
   GGML_GLU_OP_GEGLU,
   GGML_GLU_OP_SWIGLU,
   GGML_GLU_OP_SWIGLU_OAI,
   GGML_GLU_OP_GEGLU_ERF,
   GGML_GLU_OP_GEGLU_QUICK,
   GGML_GLU_OP_COUNT)
with Convention => C;
